name: Collection Report
query:
SELECT
    PE.name AS "ID:Link/Payment Entry:120",
    PE.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:70",
    SIEM.sales_person AS "Sales Person:Link/Sales Person",
    PE.party AS "Party:Link/Customer:120",
    PE.party_name AS "Party Name",
    PE.paid_amount AS "Received Amount:Currency",
    PE.status AS "Status",
    PER.reference_name AS "Name(Payment Entry Reference)",
    PER.allocated_amount AS "Allocated(Payment Entry Reference):Currency",
    PER.due_date AS "Due date(Payment Entry Reference):Date:70",
    PE.unallocated_amount AS "Unallocated Amount:Currency",
   CASE
        WHEN PE.unallocated_amount = 0 THEN CAST(PER.allocated_amount AS DECIMAL(10, 2))
        ELSE CAST(PE.unallocated_amount + COALESCE(PER.allocated_amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(10, 2))
    END AS "Total:Currency"
FROM 
    `tabPayment Entry` AS PE 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN `tabPayment Entry Reference` AS PER ON PER.parent = PE.name
    LEFT OUTER JOIN `tabCustomer` AS SIEM ON SIEM.name = PE.party
WHERE 
    (DATE(PE.`posting_date`) BETWEEN %(from_to)s AND %(to_date)s)  
    AND PE.company = %(company)s 
    AND PE.docstatus = 1
    AND PE.payment_type = "Receive"
GROUP BY
    PE.name,PER.reference_name

UNION

SELECT
    JE.name AS "ID:Link/Journal Entry:120",
    JE.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:70",
    SIEM1.sales_person AS "Sales Person",
    JEA.party AS "Party:Link/Customer:120",
    (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CU.customer_name) FROM `tabCustomer` CU WHERE CU.name = JEA.party) AS "Party Name",
    CASE 
        WHEN JEA.reference_name IS NOT NULL THEN JE.total_credit  
        ELSE 0 
    END AS "Received Amount:Currency",
    JE.docstatus AS "Status",
    JEA.reference_name AS "Name(Payment Entry Reference)",
    CASE 
        WHEN JEA.reference_name IS NOT NULL THEN JEA.credit_in_account_currency 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS "Allocated(Payment Entry Reference):Currency",
    JEA.reference_due_date AS "Due date(Payment Entry Reference):Date:70",
   CASE 
        WHEN JEA.reference_name IS NULL THEN JEA.credit_in_account_currency 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS "Unallocated Amount",
    JEA.credit_in_account_currency AS "Total:Currency"
 
FROM 
    `tabJournal Entry` AS JE
    INNER JOIN `tabJournal Entry Account` JEA ON JE.name = JEA.parent AND JEA.party_type = "Customer"
    LEFT JOIN `tabPayment Entry` AS PE ON JE.name = PE.name
    LEFT OUTER JOIN `tabCustomer` AS SIEM1 ON SIEM1.name = JEA.party
    
WHERE 
    (DATE(JE.`posting_date`) BETWEEN %(from_to)s AND %(to_date)s)
    AND JE.company = %(company)s
    AND JE.docstatus = 1
GROUP BY
    JE.name, JEA.reference_name;
